fis.experimenttemplate.experimenttemplat:
Specifies a stop condition for an experiment template.

For more information, see [Stop conditions](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/fis/latest/userguide/stop-conditions.html) in the *AWS Fault Injection Simulator User Guide*.

fis.experimenttemplate.experimenttemplat.Description: The source for the stop condition. Specify `aws:cloudwatch:alarm` if the stop condition is defined by a CloudWatch alarm. Specify `none` if there is no stop condition.
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the CloudWatch alarm. This is required if the source is a CloudWatch alarm.
